scale.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl tracking-tighter leading-none font-medium
scale.h2: text-2xl sm:text-3xl lg:text-4xl tracking-tight leading-tight font-medium

layout_spacing.philosophy: Generous spacing. Use p-8 to p-16 for main sections. Let elements breathe.

header.classes: fixed top-0 w-full z-50 backdrop-blur-xl bg-[#F9F6F0]/80 border-b border-[#2B4A33]/10
header.nav_links: hidden md:flex gap-8 text-[#1C231A] text-sm font-medium tracking-wide hover:text-[#C46D46] transition-colors

hero_section.layout: Asymmetrical split or overlapping bento grid. Do not use generic centered hero.
hero_section.cta: bg-[#2B4A33] text-[#F9F6F0] rounded-full px-8 py-4 font-medium hover:bg-[#223B28] transition-all flex items-center gap-2
hero_section.whatsapp_cta: bg-white text-[#2B4A33] border border-[#2B4A33]/20 rounded-full px-6 py-4 font-medium hover:bg-[#F1EBE1] transition-all flex items-center gap-2

menu_card.add_button: mt-4 w-full bg-[#2B4A33]/10 text-[#2B4A33] hover:bg-[#2B4A33] hover:text-[#F9F6F0] rounded-full py-2 font-medium transition-colors

cart_drawer.service_toggles: grid grid-cols-3 gap-2 p-1 bg-[#F1EBE1] rounded-lg mb-6

reservation_form.container: bg-[#FFFFFF] p-8 md:p-12 rounded-3xl border border-[#2B4A33]/10 shadow-sm
reservation_form.input_style: bg-[#F9F6F0] border-transparent focus:border-[#2B4A33] focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#2B4A33] rounded-xl text-[#1C231A]
reservation_form.date_picker: Shadcn Calendar - customize with #2B4A33 active states and Cormorant Garamond for month headers.

admin_dashboard.card: bg-white rounded-xl border border-[#2B4A33]/10 p-6 shadow-sm
admin_dashboard.table: Shadcn Table. Clean rows, border-b border-[#2B4A33]/5. No zebra striping.

media.brand_logo: Use a text-based logo with 'Tierra' in Cormorant Garamond italic and 'ORGANIC BISTRO' in Manrope overline style below it.

instructions_to_main_agent: CRITICAL: Add 'data-testid' to ALL interactive elements (buttons, links, form inputs, cart toggles).
Install and configure 'Cormorant Garamond' and 'Manrope' fonts from Google Fonts in index.html or layout wrapper.
Use Lucide-React for icons, specifically choosing the lighter stroke weights if possible (e.g. strokeWidth={1.5}).
Do NOT use raw HTML <select> or <input type='date'>. MUST use Shadcn Dropdown/Select and Calendar components.
For the Menu sections, avoid generic grids. Use an asymmetrical layout or bento-style cards as defined in layout_spacing.
Do not use generic blue/purple colors anywhere. Stick strictly to the defined organic color palette.
Make sure the hero image uses the provided 'hero_ambient' URL with the specific gradient overlay.
Ensure contrast ratios meet WCAG AA standards, particularly when placing white text over images. Use drop shadows on text if necessary.
Stripe integration should use a clean, minimal interface matching the app's styling.
